title: eriosyce odieri subsp. malleolata
intro: Eriosyce odieri subsp. malleolata, also known as Malleolata Cactus, is a rare and endemic species of cactus in the Eriosyce genus, found in the Atacama Desert in Chile. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its stem and roots. The Malleolata Cactus is believed to have health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also used in the form of a topical cream or ointment to treat various health conditions.
